response.justification: Sarah has a strong background in software development with diverse experience in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the role. Her experience in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects is a significant plus.
strengths: Diverse programming language skills including JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, and Dlang
Experience in building and maintaining large-scale systems
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
No explicit mention of experience with experimentation platforms or feature-flagging systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in AI and experimentation
